content:
📌 Version 4.8: Final Questions Before Lock-In

1. Should students be allowed to “stack” redemption paths (e.g., use multiple performances to fully erase failures)?

✔ One redemption per failure to prevent exploitation.
✔ If a student “stacks” redemptions, they must complete an increasingly difficult challenge.

2. Should failure on a second consecutive Mastery Exam add a stronger penalty?

✔ If a student fails twice in a row, they must complete a literary “penance quest” (e.g., defend a literary villain in front of the class).

3. Should the final class-wide event allow students to “spend” XP for team advantages?

✔ XP can be spent to gain advantages in an Olympic-style literature competition (debate, trivia, storytelling).
✔ Top XP earners can “buy” small in-game perks (extra time, reroll questions, audience assistance).
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 96 (chunk 96/555)
